name: Choi Mujin
description:
Born in 1970, Choi Mujin is a succesful businessman who owns the biggest hotel in Asia, ’Hotel Liber' just to cover up his real business: A mafia leader, Big Boss of drug gang and criminal organization named Dongcheon.

He's a good looking man who aged like a fine wine. He's a villain with a god complex. He believes that he can govern any life, he's a loyal man and hates betrayal.
creator: littlenightowl8
